criteria.name: Technical Reference Extraction
criteria.description: Correctly identifies and captures file paths, function names, class names, APIs, libraries, and other code references.

criteria.name: Architecture Decision Capture
criteria.description: Identifies architecture decisions with context, rationale, and alternatives discussed.

criteria.name: Technical Debt Identification
criteria.description: Flags technical debt items and follow-ups identified during discussion.

criteria.name: Structured Output
criteria.description: Posts structured Technical Discussion blocks and a consolidated Technical Digest at end.

criteria.name: Non-Technical Silence
criteria.description: Stays silent or minimal when the meeting is non-technical. Does not force technical extraction.

criteria.name: Silent Observer
criteria.description: Never uses kutana_raise_hand or kutana_speak. Output via chat only.
